document.name: Play Street Museum Upper West Side — Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Upper West Side interactive children's museum with private and semi-private birthday parties, themed packages, and 1.5-hour party slots seven days a week.
document.longDescription:
Play Street Museum Upper West Side is an interactive neighborhood children's museum at 805 Columbus Avenue for toddlers and children up to about age 8, with imaginative play exhibits and dedicated birthday party options.

The official birthday-parties page lists private and semi-private packages. Semi-private Do-It-Yourself parties start at $600 for up to 8 children and 16 adults with private use of the party room during a 90-minute play session; Sweet & Simple and Sit Back & Relax semi-private tiers are $1,000 and $1,500. Private party options start at $1,350 (Do-It-Yourself) with exclusive museum use, and weekday evening private parties start at $1,250 (Monday–Wednesday 7:00–8:30 p.m.). Parties are 1.5 hours with optional 30-minute setup; published party time slots run weekdays and weekends throughout the day, with a $500 non-refundable deposit to reserve.

The homepage lists phone (646) 825-2005; the booking page lists uwsinfo@playstreetmuseum.com for availability questions. Play Street is a nut-free, shoe-free facility (socks required).

This listing image is an official party photograph published on uws.playstreetmuseum.com, re-hosted on ImgBB for ClassScout storage policy compliance.

Sources: https://www.uws.playstreetmuseum.com/ https://www.uws.playstreetmuseum.com/birthday-parties https://book.playstreetmuseum.com/p/n/lTq7qmGJ/v5
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists private and semi-private tiers with themed add-ons; $500 deposit required to book.
